title: An Act authorizing the city of North Adams to appoint retired North Adams police officers as special police officers within said city for paid detail assignments

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Barrett of North Adams, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4141) of John Barrett, III (by the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of North Adams be authorized to appoint retired North Adams police officers as special police officers within said city for paid detail assignments.  Public Service.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Public Service
Accompanied a study order, see  H5312 (under House Rule 27)
Reported from the committee on House Rules
Reported on a part of H5312
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
Read second and ordered to a third reading
